arts.ttl: Celtic and Rangers join race to sign Crystal Palace man who is high in demand
arts.sum: Crystal Palace players are high in demand ahead of the summer transfer window. Eberechi Eze could be on his way out of the club after Manchester United are showing serious interest in signing him this summer. Along with Eze, centre-back Marc Guehi, who has been the club’s most consistent performer for a very long time, […] The post Celtic and Rangers join race to sign Crystal Palace man who is high in demand appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Juventus keen on offering Douglas Luiz in move for Newcastle United’s Sandro Tonali
arts.sum: Serie A giants Juventus are keen on signing Newcastle United’s Sandro Tonali and are willing to offer Douglas Luiz in a deal. Daniele Longo has reported today that Newcastle United…

arts.ttl: My team-mates were 'puking' during our nightmare flight to Newcastle
arts.sum: Carlton Cole has recalled the turbulent flight to Newcastle that left those around him 'puking' after their plane was thrown around like 'God's basketball' during a storm. Fast forward to the present day and Cole will be keeping a close eye on Newcastle United's game against Crystal Palace tonight as the Magpies look to go five points clear of Chelsea in the Champions League race.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United to loan player out – Agrees to join Magpies, family visits club
arts.sum: Newcastle United are planning to loan out youngster Antoñito Cordero next season, rather than including him in Eddie Howe’s squad. That’s according to Diario Sur, who cover the impending transfer today and how Newcastle won the race for the highly rated winger. Reports yesterday across Spain made it clear that Newcastle have won the race The post Newcastle United to loan player out – Agrees to join Magpies, family visits club appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United mocked up images spark fury in Spain amid June transfer leaks
arts.sum: Malaga offered Cordero - sometimes referred to as Anonito in the Spanish press - a new deal earlier this year but the offer was turned down and his current contract expires at the end of June. Malaga officials have reacted angrily after news of Antonio Cordero's transfer to Newcastle United was leaked early.

arts.ttl: Ian Darke's Premier League stars of the season: Salah, Isak, more
arts.sum: It's fair to say Mohamed Salah will scoop up all the individual prizes in England this season, but who else has stood out in the Premier League? Ian Darke makes his picks.

arts.ttl: DS Eagles & Palace stars unite for special cover of ‘Glad All Over’
arts.sum: Palace for Life, the official charity of Crystal Palace F.C., has released a cover of the club’s iconic walk-out anthem, Glad All Over by The Dave Clark Five. Performed by its Down’s Syndrome football team, the DS Eagles and Crystal Palace players, the song aims to challenge stereotypes around Down’s Syndrome and employment, and raise funds for the charity’s work.

arts.ttl: Newcastle vs Palace preview: Howe absent as Guehi, Nketiah return
arts.sum: “Being in a fantastic position in the league, playing the semi-final of the FA Cup in 10 days, having almost everyone available and fit – it’s a great period of Crystal Palace of all time. Oliver Glasner has urged his Crystal Palace players to embrace being a part of one of the best periods in the club’s history.

arts.ttl: Meet the Newcastle United backroom team tasked with aiding Jason Tindall in Eddie Howe's absence
arts.sum: Eddie Howe has often sought to deflect praise away from himself and onto his team of hard working coaches at Newcastle United . Weatherstone enjoyed a lengthy playing career spanning 15 years, with the coach moving into roles as Burnley's under-23 manager, Bournemouth's first-team coach and then joining Howe on Tyneside in 2021.

arts.ttl: Sources: Newcastle lead the interest in £50m Premier League attacker who Arsenal and Liverpool also like
arts.sum: TBR Football understands that there is an acceptance at Brentford that Bryan Mbeumo will leave this summer and there is a large amount of interest...
